name: Witch Doctor
description: Malpractice makes perfect. Zharvakko, the Witch Doctor A wiry silhouette hitches forward—uneven of feature and limb, bizarre of gait, relentlessly criss-crossing the battlefield in search of that vital weak point where his talents can do most good, and most harm.

abilities.name: Gris-Gris
abilities.description: Starts the game with a neutral consumable item — Gris-Gris. This can be consumed anytime to grant the stored gold to the Doctor. The stored gold passively increases per in-game interval.

abilities.name: Paralyzing Cask
abilities.description: Launches a cask that ricochets between enemy units, stunning and damaging those it hits. Blocks the ability effects on the affected unit individually per proc. Neither stops the bounce component, nor stops the damage increment component.

abilities.name: Voodoo Restoration
abilities.description: Focuses his magic to heal nearby allied units, costing mana every second to keep the aura active.

abilities.name: Maledict
abilities.description: The curse also deals bursts of damage per interval based on the amount of current health lost since the curse begin. The curse damage procs on debuff immune targets but its damage doesn't ignore the magic resistance bonus granted by debuff immunity sources.

abilities.name: Voodoo Switcheroo
abilities.description: The Doctor turns into the Death Ward of its corresponding level while being hidden.
